title: abeec Christmas Window Clings – 4 Reusable Gel Sticker Sheets with Santa, Snowman, Tree & Reindeer – Peel & Stick Decorations for Festive Windows, Glass Doors & Kids’ Christmas Crafts
features: Bring windows to life – Includes 4 festive sheets of reusable Christmas window clings featuring Santa, snowman, Christmas tree and reindeer characters for instant seasonal magic.
Reusable gel stickers – Made from soft PVC gel that clings easily to smooth surfaces like glass, mirrors and tiles without glue, tape, or residue.
Perfect size for decorating – Each sheet measures approx. 20 × 20 cm, lightweight (under 0.2 kg total), making them easy for kids and adults to handle.
Creative festive fun – Ideal for family craft sessions, school classrooms, office decorations, or adding Christmas spirit to shop windows and parties.
Part of a complete solution – Pair with abeec wrapping paper, gift labels or Christmas Eve boxes for a coordinated festive look across your home and celebrations.
description: Product Description Festive Window Decorations for a Merry Christmas Find the Right abeec Festive Decorations for Your Home Christmas Window Clings Add To Basket Christmas Wrapping Sheets Add To Basket 120 Gift Labels Tags Add To Basket Santa's Been Add To Basket MYO Christmas Decorations Buying Options Christmas Magic Box Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.6 out of 5 stars 18 4.5 out of 5 stars 40 4.6 out of 5 stars 117 4.2 out of 5 stars 59 — — Price £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 — £9.89 £ 9 . 89 Contents 4 sticker sheets 15 Wrapping Sheets 120 Labels for presents Stencils, key & placemat 30 Wooden Decorations Xmas Eve Box + Activities Best For Windows, Christmas Decorations Gift wrapping Labelling presents & gift bags Christmas Eve Magic Christmas Craft for kids Christmas Activity for kids Compliments All abeec festive kits Gift bags & labels Wrapping Paper Sheets Christmas Eve Box abeec arts and crafts range Bundle for xmas eve Child-Friendly ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Reusable ✔ ✘ ✘ ✘ ✘ ✔ Are these window clings truly reusable? Yes, they can be peeled off and repositioned multiple times without losing stickiness. What surfaces do they work best on? Smooth, non-porous surfaces like glass, mirrors, tiles and some plastics. Do they leave any marks or residue? No – the PVC gel material clings naturally without adhesive, so surfaces stay clean. Can children use them safely? Yes, they are CE tested and suitable for children over 3 years under adult supervision. Can they be stored for next year? Yes, place them back on the original backing sheet and store flat in a cool, dry place. abeec Reusable Christmas Window Clings – Festive Gel Stickers Pack What is it? A pack of 4 reusable festive gel sticker sheets with Christmas characters for windows, mirrors and smooth surfaces. Total Sheets 4 Sheets of stickers Sheet Size Approx 20x20cm each Characters Included Santa, snowman, reindeer, Christmas tree, stars, presents, snowflakes Material PVC gel (reusable, non-adhesive) Suitable Use Cases Decorating windows, classroom activities, shop displays, kids’ festive crafts Did you know? We decorate windows at Christmas for various historical, religious, and cultural reasons, including as a sign of hospitality and welcome for travelers, to symbolize hope and light, to remember loved ones who are away or have passed, and to celebrate the coming of the Christmas spirit into the home.
